method: ReCAST - Rejuvenation by Causal And Signature-reversal Targeting

stages.action: GTEx skeletal muscle aged->young uninjured axis (curated 56-gene panel)
stages.detail: 803 RNA-seq donors; verified TPM<->metadata alignment via XIST/RPS4Y1 (543/543 called-male matched label; 260 labelled-female left uncalled by strict two-marker gate; zero discordance among called); excluded 87 (82 pathology-flagged for fibrosis/atrophy/inflammation/necrosis + 5 QC-only RIN<6; of which 80 pathology-only, 5 QC-only, 2 both); n=716 kept; partial corr vs age (decade brackets -> midpoints, continuous) adj sex/RIN/ischemic time; BH-FDR; 95% CI via Fisher z.

stages.action: signed causal / MR evidence (tiered; direction/risk prior only)
stages.note: candidate-specific MR largely absent for non-taurine members -> scored as penalized uncertainty (E2=1), not fabricated; de-novo MR not run; PMID 38366876 names no NAD-precursor hit, so not used for NR direction

stages.action: qualitative literature hallmark-reversal score per candidate

stages.held_out: GlyNAC (best redox agent; shares glycine+cysteine with 1C cocktail) -> redox add-on arm

stages.action: oral human-trial precedent (ADMET/exposure deferred to Stage 1)

stages.result: consistency check on a small labelled set: taurine/UroA/NR recovered (3/3, each scored from its own literature), spermidine excluded (fails computed target-fit). Shows the rubric is internally coherent and can reject a data-contradicted agent - it is not a blinded held-out validation, and no differential-abundance or source-method baseline was run.

labels.computed: my own analysis (GTEx axis, scoring, benchmark, set-cover)
labels.retrieved: PMIDs, NCTs, GWAS counts, dataset identity
labels.proposed: scoring rubric/weights, distinctness filter, pilot protocol

status: RETROSPECTIVE PROOF-OF-CONCEPT instantiation of the ReCAST method - not a prospectively frozen/blinded discovery run. No hashed protocol or coded ledger was created prospectively; blinding / held-out-recovery / sensitivity / specificity are NOT claimed.

execution_vs_specification.S1: EXECUTED: curated 56-gene panel in GTEx (n=716). SPEC: transcriptome-wide, deconvolved, replicated signature with injury/cytostasis controls.
execution_vs_specification.S2: EXECUTED: tiered literature causal prior (taurine intervention + metabolome-wide MR as direction prior). SPEC: candidate-specific signed genetics per metabolite. De-novo MR NOT run.
execution_vs_specification.S3: EXECUTED: qualitative literature reversal score. SPEC: quantitative perturbation-signature reversal with specificity tests.
execution_vs_specification.S4: EXECUTED: expert-coded hallmark matrix + set-cover + distinctness filter. SPEC: Reactome/KEGG/STRING network set-cover with redundancy metric.
execution_vs_specification.S5: EXECUTED: oral human-trial precedent. SPEC: ADMET / formulation / aged-muscle exposure + target-engagement.
execution_vs_specification.benchmark: EXECUTED: small-set consistency check (3 positives from own literature, 1 negative). SPEC: blinded held-out validation vs differential-abundance and source-method baselines.

gtex_sample_flow.alignment: expression sex-call matched label for 543/543 called-male; 260 labelled-female left uncalled by strict two-marker gate; zero discordance among called

power_calculation.primary_endpoint: ex-vivo EDL specific force (kN/m^2), aged mice, cocktail vs vehicle
power_calculation.multiplicity: Primary: cocktail vs vehicle at alpha=0.05. Secondary family: 2 constituent drop-outs, Holm-adjusted, gated behind a positive primary. Scramble / 1C-MIM / exercise are context arms, also gated.
power_calculation.sex: both sexes; analyzed with sex as a stratification covariate (not separately powered unless a sex interaction is pre-declared)
power_calculation.caveat: SD from published mouse EDL specific-force ranges (Brooks & Faulkner; Lynch et al.); the true SD is confirmed in Stage-1/pilot and the calc re-run before registration.

candidate_universe.status: RETROSPECTIVE PROTOTYPE - hand-curated shortlist, not an automated search of a large candidate space
candidate_universe.how_shortlist_built: metabolites/nutraceuticals with (a) a documented muscle- or aging-relevant mechanism AND (b) at least one human oral study, drawn from muscle-aging and geroprotector literature; NOT an exhaustive metabolome enumeration

explicitly_rejected.reason: computed target-fit fails: polyamine-synthesis genes DHPS/SMS/SRM INCREASE with age in the panel (DHPS r=+0.195, FDR=3e-6) - against a 'restore' rationale
high evidence (rank 2, 7.5) but EXCLUDED from the primary cocktail by the distinctness filter - glycine + cysteine overlap the 1C cocktail; retained as a redox add-on arm

candidate_universe.not_enumerated: A full metabolome-wide candidate universe (e.g. HMDB / Metabolomics-Workbench-derived) was NOT generated; this is the primary scope limit of the prototype.

figures.fig1: curated 56-gene panel, partial-r vs age with 95% CI, CVD-safe (blue=decline / orange=increase), hatched=confound, sci-notation FDR
figures.fig2: A: evidence scores + weighted total + dedicated gate-status column (blue pass / orange excl); B: hallmark coverage, selected pair flagged, distinctness triangle
